title: Appointment availability sync and booking confirmation
summary: Connects locally imported CRM/ad availability with self-hosted booking requests, conflict detection, and confirmation readiness.

includedStages.name: Availability sync snapshot
includedStages.scope: Build an operator-owned local sync snapshot from sanitized booking requests and locally cached clinic slots.

includedStages.name: Conflict handling
includedStages.scope: Detect stale slots, duplicate source slots, overlapping slots, and booking requests without a compatible local slot.

includedStages.name: Booking confirmation readiness
includedStages.scope: Prepare safe confirmation candidates that can be completed through the existing Stage 5S self-hosted booking-from-slot endpoint.

operatorFlow: Import sanitized CRM/ad export with Stage 8A-8C into Stage 5Q.
Inspect local slot cache and booking queue through the self-hosted operator workspace.
Run the Stage 8D-8F planner against a local redacted snapshot.
Confirm only compatible requests through Stage 5S booking-from-slot.

verification.expectedConfirmation: Confirmed: Stage 8D-8F synced from main, no conflicts.
